title: TTT Mythical Machines
description: Harness powerful machines from Mekanism, use powers from vampires and werewolves, collect special artifacts around the world and more!
body:
This modpack is centered around Mekanism but with alot of other extra's here and there.

Like my other modpacks it was originaly made for me and my friends but just like with the other packs, I like to share my modpacks for anyone to look at and use.

Some of the mods included are: Mekanism, Ad Astra, Vampirism, Werewolves, Tectonic, SecurityCraft, All of YUNG's library and more.

Feel free to use change the config of the modpack yourself!
